g.text: Administrator edits dock details\nand clicks "Save Changes"
Checks for duplicate dock name,\nvalidates numeric values, and ensures\nMaxDraft ≤ Depth
400 Bad Request + "Dock with name already exists"
SELECT * FROM VesselTypes WHERE Id IN (ids)
length, depth, maxDraft, maxSTS, vesselTypes, isActive)
Applies only modified fields\nand sets UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
Displays success confirmation\nand redirects to dock details page
